channel.title: LobangKing.sg — Singapore Lobangs
channel.description: Verified daily promos, freebies and discounts across Singapore.

item.title: Up to 20% off TVs + up to $700 off soundbars
item.description: Jackpot Sale storewide: up to 20% off selected TVs (free gifts worth up to $1,888), up to $700 off soundbars, plus fridge, washer and Dyson deals. Selected models, while stocks last.

item.title: 7% + 7% off sitewide with code GET7
item.description: Pre-07.07 Sale: stack 7% + 7% off sitewide with no minimum spend (capped at $99). Some brands excluded (Apple, Dyson, Sony and more). Online only.

item.title: Limited-time voucher on selected tech & appliances
item.description: Limited-time online voucher on selected products (valid 22 Jun to 26 Jul), running alongside the in-store Monster-Sized Sale of 8% off your 1st item and 10% off your 2nd.

item.title: Microsoft 365 at $145 + 5% off notebooks
item.description: July notebook bundle: get Microsoft 365 for $145 with a selected notebook, plus a 5% off notebook coupon. Brands include Acer, ASUS, Lenovo and MSI.

item.title: $99 Return Flights to Bangkok
item.description: All-in return fares to Bangkok on selected July–September dates. Limited seats per flight — clears fast on weekends.

item.title: $50 Cashback — New DBS Live Fresh Card
item.description: Welcome cashback credited within 30 days of first spend. Card gives 5% back on online and contactless spend.

item.title: Kids Eat Free — IKEA Restaurant
item.description: One free kids' meal with every adult main course purchased, every weekday. IKEA Family membership is free to join.

item.title: AIRism Tees from $9.90
item.description: Cooling AIRism range marked down for the heat. Selected colours and sizes; restocks midweek.

item.title: 15% off Singapore Attractions
item.description: Discount on the Flyer, S.E.A. Aquarium, Universal Studios and more. Great for staycations and visiting family.

item.title: Buy 2 Get 1 Free — Vitamins
item.description: Across selected health supplement brands. Mix and match within participating ranges; cheapest item is free.
